text:
[Verse]
ピンクの光に包まれて、黒いドレスを纏う  
カードが舞い散る中、瞳は輝く  

[Pre-Chorus]
手にはチップ、心は鼓動  
このゲームで勝ち取る未来を  

[Chorus]
ああ、賭けたのは夢と希望  
今、君と戦う！  
光の中で、我らは王座を掴む  
すべての牌、私の手に！

[Outro]
静かに、風が吹き抜ける  
次の一手、待つだけ…

text: Energetic synth-pop with driving bassline and pulsating hi-hats, building intensity from a crisp intro to a soaring climax at 2.5s, then dropping into a sharp, rhythmic outro. Hook emerges mid-section with layered vocal chops and glittering arpeggios, punctuated by sudden staccato percussion bursts. Tempo accelerates slightly as motion peaks, maintaining high energy without losing clarity. Emotional arc: confident, playful, then triumphant—perfect for an anime opening with bold visuals.
